calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Felix Martin appeared by telephone for and with James Lorenzetti (present).

The Court stated that this is very frustrating because all it needs is a proposed order, and that despite multiple continuances in which the tentative rulings informed Counsel of that and the issuance of an order to appear, it still does not have an order and it is a waste of the Court's resources. Mr. Martin stated that Mr. Lorenzetti has the order with him today. Mr. Lorenzetti stated that he has the grant deeds. The Court informed Counsel and Mr. Lorenzetti that this is not what it needs, and that it needs an order that conforms with the local rules that has a complete legal description of the real property. Mr. Martin apologized to the Court and stated that he will provide an order today. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account is continued to June 11, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Continued To May-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that this petition did not include an order which includes the legal description of the real property despite multiple continuances for Counsel to provide one. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Personal Representative and the Attorney to appear on May 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have failed to provide a proper form of order. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Continued To Oct-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Felix Martin appeared by telephone for James Lorenzetti.

Mr. Martin stated that he has the petition for final distribution ready to go, but it just needs to be signed. Status on close of estate is continued to October 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Continued To Oct-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Felix Martin for and with James Lorenzetti.

Mr. Martin stated that they have one asset and that he is going to file a petition for final distribution this week. Status on close of estate is continued to October 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear and the order to show cause are off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Continued To Sep-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on September 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Executor to appear on September 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he should not be suspended for failure to appear, and for failure to file a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Continued To Sep-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Felix Martin appeared by telephone for James Lorenzetti.

The Court informed Counsel that he needs to file a petition to close the estate or a petition for approval of report on status of administration that complies with Probate Code 12201. Mr. Martin stated that the inventory and appraisal is being sent out today. Status on close of estate is continued to September 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

MINI MINUTES:

Status on close of estate is continued to August 8, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Continued To May-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on May 30, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear, and why a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
